Qian Tong ťĆĘťäÖ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qian Tong (ťĆĘťäÖ)was born in Wucheng. Led forces against Sun Ce but was defeated. Qian Tong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
